fun_fact: June 5 is World Environment Day. Say 'environmentalist', and most imagine someone protesting on a street or hugging a tree. But to be an environmentalist is simply to understand that a healthy, functioning natural environment is the basis of all life on Earth — and to protect it, for today and tomorrow. So what will you say if someone asks you, 'Are you an environmentalist?' [Here's my answer](https://sunnyclimatestormyclimate.substack.com/p/so-youre-an-environmentalist-now).
